creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
(In reply to sec from comment #0)

I´d sometimes see errors like this on things like microSD or usb2-connected media. It seemed that on a fast connection they couldn´t keep up with the writes.

I can´t replicate your problem on eg hd or nvme
